agencies.name: Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
Dept. of Youth and Community Dev.
Dept. of Records and Information Services

agreements.title: DARB Data Share MOU & BAA
agreements.description: Data sharing between HRA and DOF for the Data Analytics and Research Bureau (DARB), including a Business Associate Agreement covering protected health information.

agreements.title: HASA Pilot Program Data Sharing
agreements.description: Three-party data sharing agreement between HRA, CUNY, and DOHMH supporting the HIV/AIDS Services Administration (HASA) pilot program.

agreements.title: IDNYC Middle School Cards MOU
agreements.description: MOU governing distribution of IDNYC cards through DOE middle schools, covering data sharing for enrollment and verification.

agreements.title: IDNYC Enrollment Site MOU
agreements.description: MOU establishing DYCD community centers as IDNYC enrollment sites, defining data flows between DYCD and HRA/DSS for applicant processing.

agreements.title: Test and Trace Robocalls Intra-City Agreement
agreements.description: Intra-city agreement for COVID-19 Test and Trace program robocall outreach, sharing HRA/DSS client contact data with DOHMH for public health notifications.

agreements.title: DOPIS Data Sharing Agreement
agreements.description: Data sharing between HRA and NYS Office of Mental Health for the Division of Program and Policy Integration and Support, covering mental health service recipients.

agreements.title: HRA-DOHMH Health Statistics Cooperative Agreement FY20-22
agreements.description: Cooperative agreement for sharing health statistics data between HRA and DOHMH to improve service delivery and population health monitoring for FY2020-2022.

agreements.title: Finance-HRA Cooperative Agreement
agreements.description: Cooperative agreement between DOF and HRA governing use of tax and property data for benefits eligibility determination and anti-fraud efforts.

agreements.title: Inter-Agency Data Exchange Agreement (HHS)
agreements.description: Data exchange agreement for Health and Human Services programs, enabling DOF to share financial records with HRA for benefits administration.

agreements.title: MyCity Childcare Portal Data Sharing Agreement
agreements.description: 20-page data sharing agreement for the MyCity portal childcare application feature, covering exchange of ACS childcare subsidy eligibility data via the OTI-managed platform.

agreements.title: Child Abuse and Neglect Investigation Data Sharing
agreements.description: MOU governing joint ACS-NYPD Special Victims Division investigations of child abuse and neglect, defining data exchange protocols for case coordination.

agreements.title: School-Based Child Welfare Services Data Exchange
agreements.description: Agreement enabling ACS caseworkers to access DOE enrollment and attendance records to locate and support children involved in child welfare cases.

agreements.title: Health Services for Children in Foster Care
agreements.description: Data sharing agreement to coordinate health and mental health services for children in ACS foster care, enabling DOHMH to track and manage health interventions.

agreements.title: Shelter and Benefits Coordination MOU
agreements.description: MOU coordinating DHS shelter placement data with HRA benefits eligibility systems to streamline services for homeless individuals and families.

agreements.title: Housing Stability Plus Program Data Sharing
agreements.description: Agreement for sharing rental subsidy and housing placement data between HPD and HRA/DSS under the Housing Stability Plus rental assistance program.

agreements.title: After School Programs Data Sharing
agreements.description: Data sharing between DOE and DYCD covering student enrollment, attendance, and academic progress data for participants in DYCD-funded after school programs.

agreements.title: Elder Care Services Data Exchange
agreements.description: Agreement enabling DFTA and DOHMH to share health and social service records for elderly New Yorkers to coordinate care and prevent duplicate service delivery.

agreements.title: Traffic Safety Data Exchange
agreements.description: MOU governing exchange of crash, summons, and enforcement data between DOT and NYPD to support Vision Zero traffic safety analysis and targeted enforcement.

agreements.title: Property Records and Violations Data Exchange
agreements.description: Data exchange enabling DOB to share building permit and violation records with DOF to support property tax assessment and lien issuance.

agreements.title: Reentry Services Data Sharing
agreements.description: Agreement enabling pre-release data sharing between DOC and MOCJ to coordinate reentry services, housing, and benefits enrollment for individuals leaving City jails.

agreements.title: Pre-Trial Detention Data Exchange
agreements.description: MOU governing the exchange of arrest, booking, and detention records between NYPD and DOC to streamline intake processes and track individuals through the justice system.

agreements.title: Criminal Justice Reform Initiative Data Sharing
agreements.description: Three-party agreement supporting the Mayor's Criminal Justice Reform Initiative, enabling cross-agency data analysis on summons, arraignments, and case outcomes.

agreements.title: Lead Paint and Housing Health Data Exchange
agreements.description: Agreement sharing DOHMH childhood lead poisoning case data with HPD to target remediation inspections and enforcement actions in properties with affected children.

agreements.title: School Health Services Data Exchange
agreements.description: MOU governing exchange of student health records between DOE and DOHMH for school-based health services, immunization tracking, and public health monitoring.

agreements.title: SNAP for Seniors Benefits Coordination
agreements.description: Data sharing agreement to coordinate DFTA senior center enrollment data with HRA SNAP (food stamps) eligibility systems to increase enrollment among eligible seniors.

agreements.title: Runaway and Homeless Youth Data Coordination
agreements.description: MOU enabling DYCD runaway and homeless youth shelters to share intake and service data with ACS to identify children who may need child protective services.

agreements.title: Building Code Compliance Data Exchange
agreements.description: Agreement for sharing HPD housing maintenance code violations and DOB building permits to enable coordinated enforcement against negligent landlords.

agreements.title: Street Infrastructure Coordination MOU
agreements.description: MOU coordinating DEP utility work schedules with DOT street resurfacing plans, sharing project data to minimize street cuts and reduce disruption.

agreements.title: Civil Litigation Data Sharing
agreements.description: Agreement governing the Law Department's access to NYPD records for civil litigation defense, including arrest reports, body camera footage metadata, and personnel files.

agreements.title: Workforce Development Data Sharing
agreements.description: Data sharing between SBS workforce1 career centers and DCAS to track City hiring outcomes and match job seekers with municipal employment opportunities.

agreements.title: Capital Projects Financial Data Exchange
agreements.description: Agreement enabling OMB to access DCAS capital project schedules and expenditure data for citywide capital budget monitoring and reporting.

agreements.title: Child Welfare Health Coordination
agreements.description: Agreement for DOHMH to provide health and behavioral health services data to ACS for children in foster care and preventive services programs.

agreements.title: Probation Reentry Data Coordination
agreements.description: Agreement enabling DOP to share probation supervision data with MOCJ for criminal justice reform analysis and targeted intervention program design.

agreements.title: Death Records and Benefits Coordination
agreements.description: Agreement enabling HRA to receive death certificate data from OCME to promptly terminate benefits and prevent improper payments for deceased individuals.

agreements.title: Citywide Data Integration Initiative Framework
agreements.description: Umbrella framework agreement establishing OTI as the technical operator for multi-agency data integration projects, covering data governance, security, and API access standards.

agreements.title: Street Sweeping Route Coordination
agreements.description: MOU for sharing DSNY street sweeping schedule and route data with DOT to coordinate parking sign enforcement and reduce alternate side parking confusion.
